fields.name: Contact No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the contact for the date range of the alternative address.
When you create an alternative address date range from the contact card, the program copies the contact number from the No. field in the contact table.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Contact Alt. Address Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the contact alternate address to which the date range applies.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date from which the alternate address is valid. There are certain rules for how dates should be entered.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last day on which the alternate address is valid. There are certain rules for how dates should be entered.
